---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible problem in clearfetch
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the problem clearly and briefly.

## Reproduction

Provide:

- runtime and version
- relevant request/client configuration
- minimal code sample
- actual behavior
- expected behavior

## Notes

If the report involves a suspected security issue, do not file it publicly. Use the process in `SECURITY.md`.
